query: CREATE TABLE audit_logs (id serial PRIMARY KEY NOT NULL, adminId integer, acao varchar(100) NOT NULL, tabela varchar(50) NOT NULL, registroId integer, dadosAntes json, dadosDepois json, ip varchar(45), criadoEm timestamp DEFAULT now() NOT NULL)
